prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为1576→1813→1294→1144→1269名，整体呈波动走势。2023年位次大幅前移至1294名，2024年进一步前移至1144名（近5年最佳） ，但2025年回退至1269名，较2024年后移约125名。近2年波动幅度约125–175名，显示该校在湖南物理类考生中的竞争热度处于高位震荡状态；该校在湖南省物 理类招生计划2021年70人、2022年71人、2023年67人、2024年66人、2025年60人，呈逐年小幅缩减趋势。2026年计划大幅扩招至86人，较2025年增加26人（增幅43.3% ），为近6年最高计划数。大幅扩招将显著缓解竞争压力，有利于位次后移（更容易录取）。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 哈尔滨工业大学（深圳）为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校， 共享哈工大校本部学科资源。软科中国大学排名2026年主榜第12位（哈工大校本部），属于全国顶尖高校行列，在华南地区享有极高声誉；2026年声誉评价为中 性/混合，无重大负面舆情。抖音学校热度总排名第10位（评价为高热），短视频曝光量高，反映考生关注度持续升温。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、 电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业在2024–2026年持续高热推荐，社会关注度高，吸引大量高分考生报考。湖南省2026年物理类考生约34.7万人，较2025年32.0万人增加 约8.4%，考生规模扩大加剧整体竞争。；哈尔滨工业大学（深圳）位于深圳市，地处粤港澳大湾区核心，地域优势显著，对湖南省 考生有较强吸引力；历史投档异常记录显示2024年曾有考生反映投档线波动， 但未出现严重断档；哈工大第五轮学科评估表现卓越：力学A+、机械工程A+、材料科学与工程A+、环境科学与工程A+、计算机科学与技术A、控制科学与工程A、 土木工程A、数学A。深圳校区招生专业覆盖计算机、通信、人工智能、自动化、材料、能源、土木等方向，均对应A类学科，学科实力顶尖。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次1269名、2026年大幅扩招43.3%（显著缓解竞争）、湖南省物理类考生 增加8.4%（加剧竞争）、学校高热度与顶尖学科实力（推高竞争）等多重因素，在。预测2026年物理类最低位次约1619名，区间14 25–1813名。

- 工科试验班（自主智能）（含人工智能、机器人工程、自动化）

major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次在1619名左右，区间1425–1813名。建议位次在1400名以内的考生可重点冲刺一档王牌专业（未来信息、自主智能）；位次在1600名左右的考生以二档为主（未来能源、 数学与应用数学），兼顾一档冲刺；位次在1800名左右的考生可考虑三档专业保底。注意2026年大幅扩招，位次后移趋势明显，报考机会增大。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were 1576 → 1813 → 1294 → 1144 → 1269, showing a fluctuating trend. In 2023, the ranking significantly advanced to 1294, and further advanced to 1144 in 2024 (the best in the past 5 years), but retreated to 1269 in 2025, moving back about 125 places compared to 2024. The fluctuation range in the past 2 years is about 125–175 places, indicating that the competition heat for this university among Hunan Physics Category candidates is in a high-level volatile state. The enrollment plan for this university in Hunan Province for Physics Category was 70 in 2021, 71 in 2022, 67 in 2023, 66 in 2024, and 60 in 2025, showing a gradual slight reduction trend. In 2026, the plan significantly expands to 86, an increase of 26 (43.3% increase) compared to 2025, the highest planned number in the past 6 years. The substantial expansion will significantly alleviate competition pressure, favoring a backward shift in rankings (easier admission).

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Harbin Institute of Technology (Shenzhen) is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university, sharing the disciplinary resources of the main campus of HIT. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, the main campus of HIT ranks 12th, belonging to the top-tier universities nationwide, enjoying a very high reputation in the South China region. The 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no major negative public opinion. The overall ranking of Douyin school heat is 10th (evaluated as high heat), with high short video exposure, reflecting continuously rising candidate attention.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation have been continuously highly recommended from 2024 to 2026, with high social attention, attracting a large number of high-scoring candidates. In 2026, the number of Physics Category candidates in Hunan Province is about 347,000, an increase of about 8.4% compared to 320,000 in 2025, and the expansion of the candidate scale intensifies overall competition. Harbin Institute of Technology (Shenzhen) is located in Shenzhen, at the core of the Guangdong-Hong Kong-Macao Greater Bay Area, with significant regional advantages, strongly attracting candidates from Hunan Province. Historical admission anomaly records show that in 2024, some candidates reported fluctuations in admission cutoffs, but no serious gaps occurred. HIT's fifth round of discipline evaluation performed excellently: Mechanics A+, Mechanical Engineering A+, Materials Science and Engineering A+, Environmental Science and Engineering A+, Computer Science and Technology A, Control Science and Engineering A, Civil Engineering A, Mathematics A. The Shenzhen campus offers majors covering computer science, communication, artificial intelligence, automation, materials, energy, civil engineering, etc., all corresponding to A-class disciplines, with top-tier disciplinary strength.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 1269, the significant 43.3% expansion in 2026 (significantly alleviating competition), the 8.4% increase in Hunan Physics Category candidates (intensifying competition), the university's high heat and top-tier disciplinary strength (driving up competition), the predicted 2026 minimum ranking for Physics Category is approximately 1619, with a range of 1425–1813.

- Engineering Experimental Class (Autonomous Intelligence) (including Artificial Intelligence, Robotics Engineering, Automation)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Future Energy Excellence Joint Training Class) (including Materials Science and Engineering, Energy and Power Engineering, Engineering Mechanics)
- Mathematics and Applied Mathematics (Excellence Joint Training Class)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Future City Excellence Joint Training Class) (including Civil Engineering, Environmental Engineering, Chemistry)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking is around 1619, with a range of 1425–1813. It is recommended that candidates with rankings within 1400 can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors (Future Information, Autonomous Intelligence); candidates with rankings around 1600 should mainly target Tier 2 majors (Future Energy, Mathematics and Applied Mathematics), while also attempting Tier 1; candidates with rankings around 1800 can consider Tier 3 majors as a safety option. Note the significant expansion in 2026, with a clear trend of ranking backward shift, increasing admission opportunities.

学校层次与声誉.text: Harbin Institute of Technology (Shenzhen) is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university, ranked 12th in the Soft Science Ranking, belonging to the top universities in China. Although it is known for engineering, the History Category enrollment majors (Economic Management Experimental Class, Architecture) still have strong appeal due to the overall platform of the university. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with high popularity on Douyin (ranked 10th overall), and the overall attention to the university continues to rise, positively affecting the application psychology of History Category candidates; HIT's advantageous disciplines are mainly engineering, and the History Category enrollment majors (Economic Management Experimental Class corresponds to Business Administration A, Architecture corresponds to Architecture A-) are not core A+ disciplines, but their discipline evaluation grades are still superior.

专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of Economic Management is divided and wait-and-see, while Architecture is also divided and wait-and-see. In 2026, the number of History Category candidates in Hunan Province is about 187,000, an increase of about 31.2% compared to 142,500 in 2025, with a significant expansion in the candidate pool and intensified competition. Considering the upward push effect of the significant increase in candidates on rankings, it is predicted that the minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 will be about 811, with a range of 714–908.
